# ![](https://avatars1.githubusercontent.com/u/32303769?s=40&v=4) Measurement Units for R

Support for measurement units in R vectors, matrices and arrays:
automatic propagation, conversion, derivation and simplification of
units; raising errors in case of unit incompatibility. Compatible with
the POSIXct, Date and difftime classes. Uses the UNIDATA udunits library
and unit database for unit compatibility checking and conversion.

### Documentation

Documentation is provided in an R Journal publication. Cite this package
as:

- Edzer Pebesma, Thomas Mailund and James Hiebert (2016). “Measurement
  Units in R.” *The R Journal*, 8 (2), 486–494. DOI:
  [10.32614/RJ-2016-061](https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2016-061)

The main units
[vignette](https://r-quantities.github.io/units/articles/measurement_units_in_R.html)
derives from this manuscript and is kept up to date with the package
development.

- Blog posts: [first](https://r-spatial.org/r/2016/06/10/units.html),
  [second](https://r-spatial.org/r/2016/08/16/units2.html),
  [third](https://r-spatial.org/r/2016/09/29/plot_units.html).
- The UNIDATA [udunits2](https://github.com/Unidata/UDUNITS-2) library
  at GitHub.

### What it does

Package `units` provides measurement units for R vectors: conversion,
derivation, simplification and error checking:

``` r
library(units)
(spd1 = set_units(1:5, m/s))
# Units: m/s
# [1] 1 2 3 4 5
(spd2 = set_units(1:5, km/h))
# Units: km/h
# [1] 1 2 3 4 5
spd1 + spd2                   # automatic conversion
# Units: m/s
# [1] 1.277778 2.555556 3.833333 5.111111 6.388889
spd1 * spd2                   # unit derivation
# Units: km*m/h/s
# [1]  1  4  9 16 25
spd1 * set_units(10, s) # unit simplification
# Units: m
# [1] 10 20 30 40 50
spd1 + set_units(10, s) # error checking
#   cannot convert s into m/s
```

### Installation

Install the release version from CRAN:

``` r
install.packages("units")
```

The installation of the development version from GitHub requires, e.g.,
the `remotes` package:

``` r
remotes::install_github("r-quantities/units")
```

If the installation fails due to a missing udunits2 system library,
either install it e.g. on Ubuntu or Debian by

    sudo apt-get install libudunits2-dev

on Fedora or RHEL/CentOS with

    sudo dnf install udunits2-devel

or on MacOS with

    brew install udunits

or equivalent in your distribution. Alternatively, install it from the
sources by downloading the latest version from [UDUNITS
downloads](https://downloads.unidata.ucar.edu/udunits/), and executing
the following commands in the download directory:

    tar zxf udunits-<version>.tar.gz
    cd ./udunits-<version>/
    ./configure
    make
    sudo make install
    sudo ldconfig

Then, retry the installation of `units`.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Math(`*`<units>`*`)`](Math.units.md) : Mathematical operations for
  units objects

- [`Ops(`*`<units>`*`)`](Ops.units.md) : S3 Ops Group Generic Functions
  for units objects

- [`as_difftime()`](as_difftime.md) : convert units object into difftime
  object

- [`boxplot(`*`<units>`*`)`](boxplot.units.md) : boxplot for unit
  objects

- [`cbind(`*`<units>`*`)`](cbind.units.md)
  [`rbind(`*`<units>`*`)`](cbind.units.md) : Combine R Objects by Rows
  or Columns

- [`convert_to_base()`](convert_to_base.md) : Convert units to their
  base units

- [`deparse_unit()`](deparse_unit.md) : deparse unit to string in
  product power form (e.g. km m-2 s-1)

- [`drop_units()`](drop_units.md) : Drop Units

- [`hist(`*`<units>`*`)`](hist.units.md) : histogram for unit objects

- [`install_unit()`](install_unit.md) [`remove_unit()`](install_unit.md)
  : Define or remove units

- [`keep_units()`](keep_units.md) : Apply a function keeping units

- [`load_units_xml()`](load_units_xml.md) : Load a unit system

- [`matrixOps(`*`<units>`*`)`](matrixOps.units.md) : S3 matrixOps Group
  Generic Functions for units objects

- [`mixed_units()`](mixed_units.md)
  [`` `units<-`( ``*`<mixed_units>`*`)`](mixed_units.md) : Create or
  convert to a mixed units list-column

- [`make_unit_label()`](plot.units.md)
  [`plot(`*`<units>`*`)`](plot.units.md) :

  Plot `units` objects

- [`scale_x_units()`](scale_units.md)
  [`scale_y_units()`](scale_units.md)
  [`scale_colour_units()`](scale_units.md)
  [`scale_color_units()`](scale_units.md)
  [`scale_fill_units()`](scale_units.md)
  [`scale_alpha_units()`](scale_units.md)
  [`scale_size_units()`](scale_units.md)
  [`scale_size_area_units()`](scale_units.md)
  [`scale_radius_units()`](scale_units.md)
  [`scale_linewidth_units()`](scale_units.md) : Continuous scales for
  units data

- [`seq(`*`<units>`*`)`](seq.units.md) : seq method for units objects

- [`ud_are_convertible()`](udunits2.md) [`ud_convert()`](udunits2.md) :

  udunits2 utilities

- [`unitless`](unitless.md) : The "unit" type for vectors that are
  actually dimension-less.

- [`units-defunct`](units-defunct.md) :

  Defunct functions in units

- [`` `units<-`( ``*`<numeric>`*`)`](units.md)
  [`` `units<-`( ``*`<units>`*`)`](units.md)
  [`` `units<-`( ``*`<logical>`*`)`](units.md)
  [`units(`*`<units>`*`)`](units.md)
  [`units(`*`<symbolic_units>`*`)`](units.md) [`set_units()`](units.md)
  [`make_units()`](units.md) [`as_units()`](units.md) : Handle
  measurement units

- [`units_options()`](units_options.md) : set one or more units global
  options

- [`valid_udunits()`](valid_udunits.md)
  [`valid_udunits_prefixes()`](valid_udunits.md) : Get information about
  valid units
